posts.author: HBG (Victor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

I am trying to convert the protected URL of multiple files in 1 file column to a public one and I understand that there is a way to do it with integromat. I have the webhook ready but I am not sure what module chain I should pick. can someone please provide some guidelines ?
